Coaching-Reports/Cookiemunsta/2026/March.title: 2026-03-04 REPORT
Coaching-Reports/Cookiemunsta/2026/March.content:
Coaching Report | Cookiemunsta | 2026-03-04

Good work, but we can go further!

Buildings:

Castle:

STAY AT 25! Do not Level up until buildings, heroes, and gear are caught up.


Altars:

Human: Push to 20.
Nightfall: Push to 20.
Forest: Push to 25.
Human: Push towards 25.
Nightfall: Leave at 20 for now.






                  
                  STOP PUTTING SHARDS INTO HEROES RANDOMLY 
                  
                


Ascend heroes when you can do a full star
Do not ascend heroes not in Team 1 with universal shards
Only ascend non-Team 1 heroes with hero specific shards



Heroes - Priority:

Andrew:

Level: Get to 125. 41 levels away.
Star: Get to 4 stars. 2+ away.


Sera:

Level: Get to 125. 3 levels away.
Star: Get to 4 stars. 1 star away.


Yord:

Level: Get to 125. 5 levels away.
Star: Get to 4 stars. 0.4 away.


Monica:

Level: Get to 125. 19 levels away.
Star: Get to 4 stars. 2.2 away.


Dragonic:

STOP! He is fine. Do not do anything else, let the others catch up.


Rexar:

Wait for him to be added to summoning pool.
Level: Get and push to match Team level.
Star: Get to 4 stars.


Katares:

Wait for him to be added to the summoning pool.
Level: Get and push to match Team level.
Star: Get to 4 stars.




New Team 1:

Frontline:

First: Dragonic`
Second: Andrew


Backline:

Top: Monica
Middle: Sera
Bottom: Yord






                  
                  STOP LEVELLING EVERYTHING AT THE SAME TIME 
                  
                

PRIORITIZE:

Backline: Swords to 40 → Boots to 40
Frontline: Body to 40 → Boots to 40
Orange: Level in 10 level increments as possible, not one level at a time
Purple to 10 → Gold ASAP



Gear - Team 1:

Sera:

Sword: 35
Helm: 24
Body: 2
Boots: 11


Monica:

Sword: 15
Helm: 10
Body: 21
Boots: 1


Yord:

Sword: 15
Helm: 10
Body: 13
Boots: 21


Dragonic:

Sword: 13
Helm: 6
Body: 12
Boots: 1


Andrew:

Sword: 6
Helm: 0
Body: 9
Boots: 18
